channel.title: 寂照
channel.description: 在尘世中修行，在修行中自在

item.title: 🕉️ The Karmic Cost of Slandering the Sacred Dharma
item.description: Opening: The most dangerous traps are often hidden at the tip of the tongue. Slandering the Dharma is a grave offense th

item.title: ✨ The Unattainable Mind: Finding Peace in Flowing Thoughts
item.description: In the Diamond Sutra, Buddha taught that the past, present, and future minds are unattainable. This is not just a theory

item.title: 🕊️ Awakening to the Truth of Non-Self
item.description: The Origin of Realizing Non-Self Enlightenment is the direct realization of the non-self nature of all phenomena. It is

item.title: The Power of Awareness: Cutting Karmic Cycles ✨
item.description: Thoughts flicker like shadows, and we mistake them for the self. In truth, they are mere projections of karma. When the
